description_long: This apartment building is a modern, rectangular structure with four stories, featuring a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some sections accented by vertical wooden slats and darker gray elements. Large, evenly spaced windows line each floor, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The building is set on a landscaped plot with a green lawn on one side and paved walkways and driveways surrounding it. The ground floor includes a recessed entrance area and what appears to be a garage or covered parking space. The overall design emphasizes functionality and simplicity, with subtle landscaping and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A four-story modern apartment building with a flat roof, light gray and white facade, large windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped area, and a clear view of the building's symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stretch of windows, vertical wooden accent slats, and the expansive green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying balconies, the flat roof, and the building's alignment with the lawn and driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage entrance, additional vertical wooden accents, and paved surroundings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced across each floor, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
